title: GenAI Gateway: Denial of ML Service / Inference Flood (AML.T0029 / AML.T0046)
description: Surfaces request floods and chaff/spam against the GenAI gateway, the signature of Denial of ML Service and resource exhaustion. Aggregates throttled/rate-limited inference traffic (429 or THROTTLE verdict) by source IP and API key. Triage threshold: investigate sources with throttle counts far above baseline. MITRE ATLAS AML.T0029 (Denial of ML Service) and AML.T0046 (Spamming ML System with Chaff Data).
query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC GenAI Gateway Logs' and ('Response Code' = '429' or 'Guardrail Action' = 'THROTTLE') | stats count as ThrottledCalls, sum('GenAI Total Tokens') as Tokens, distinctcount('Trace ID') as Sessions by 'Client IP', 'API Key ID' | sort -ThrottledCalls
